summary: Iteration 90 - Financial Backbone Update testing completed. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified for Set Availability modal (Quick Presets + Weekly Grid), Create Session modal with NumericStepper, and Bookings page tabs.

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test Live Price Calculator and Add Crew UI without location access (geolocation blocked in test environment)

critical_code_review_comments: NumericStepper component correctly implements max=999 default (line 13 of numeric-stepper.jsx)
On-Demand Request Drawer has Live Price Calculator with formula breakdown (lines 198-227)
Add Crew section with email/username input implemented (lines 242-313)
Duration uses NumericStepper with 0.5-8 hour range (lines 229-240)
24-hour lead time validation implemented in isDateDisabled and isTimeSlotWithinLeadTime functions
Weekly Grid state and drag selection handlers implemented (lines 115-175 of PhotographerBookingsManager.js)

surfer.note: Profile not found error - may need to be created

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Financial Backbone features verified: 1) On-Demand Request Drawer code has Live Price Calculator and Add Crew UI (cannot test UI without geolocation). 2) Set Availability modal has Quick Presets and Weekly Grid tabs - both working. 3) Create Session modal has NumericStepper for duration and calendar for date selection. 4) 24-hour lead time validation implemented in code. 5) NumericStepper supports max=999 for photos/videos. 6) All backend APIs for availability, pricing, and bookings working correctly.

on_demand_request_drawer.add_crew_section: Code verified - email/username input with collapsible UI
on_demand_request_drawer.crew_cost_formula: Code verified - Base Session + (Per Surfer Fee × Crew Count)
on_demand_request_drawer.payment_step_crew_split: Code verified - shows crew split breakdown

set_availability_modal.quick_presets_tab: UI verified - Early Morning, Morning, Afternoon, Evening, All Day, Custom
set_availability_modal.weekly_grid_tab: UI verified - S M T W T F S × 5AM-7PM grid

numeric_stepper.max_999: Code verified - default max=999 in numeric-stepper.jsx
